posts.author: Marathondreams
posts.text: Company hired investor relations firm and it must have helped them preparing their first ever investor presentation . It seems IR firm also influenced company to conduct conference call on the day of results. Such investor friendly steps would help company get better known in the investor community. In-spite of giving stellar results (BTW their IR firms name is Stellar.. ) for last few quarters, stock continues to languish only due to its SME tag. Hopefully that will go away in Q3 FY 27 as they will be able to fulfill mainboard listing condition. Disclosure - Major PF contributor. Continues to…
